regexCodeList.string: ^You are knocked down from the force of the blow!$
^As you retreat backwards, you loose your footing and stumble to the ground!$
^As you retreat backwards, you lose your footing and stumble to the ground!$
^You can't use this command while laying\.$
(?i)^There is no player with the name .+ present in the room\.\s*$
^You cannot use this type of weapon to perform a melee attack!$

(?i)^\s*(you enter the .* posture!|you enter posture:\s*\w+\s*!|you stop using posture: .*|you do not have a posture set!.*|you cannot use this ability because you have another risk posture active!|posture:\s*\w+\s+cannot be used for another\s+\d+s\.|posture:\s*\w+\s+is now ready to be used\.|you specified a target\(.+\)\s+for an ability which does not need one\..*)\s*$
(?i)^You have to be level \d+ to use Posture:.*$

(?i)^\s*(you summon forth a burst of energy and vigor, raising your morale!|your morale has grown!.*|you lose all of your morale buffs from switching out of this risk stance!|you lose the morale affect of: .*|your morale state has decayed to .*|the iron-will ends and your morale can now be lost!|you've gained the new morale buff .*|you have no morale active\.)\s*$
(?i)^You have gained a new mind state:\s*(.+)\s*!\s*$
(?i)^\s*You are in combat and cannot do this action\.\s*You may do so in\s+(\d+)\s+seconds\.\s*$
^Dragon Claw cannot be used for another .+\.$
^Dragon Claw is now ready to be used\.$
^You cannot use this type of weapon to perform a melee attack!$

Alias.name: Long distance revive
Alias.script: local tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return end Tem.pray("liturgy:ghostwaverevive", tgt, matches[2])

Alias.name: Resurrection
Alias.script: local tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return end Tem.pray("restoration", tgt, matches[2])

Alias.name: Last Rites
Alias.script: local tgt = matches[2] if not tgt or tgt == "" then tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return end end send("use lastrites " .. tgt)

Alias.name: Preach
Alias.script: local npc = matches[2] local message = matches[3] local cmd = "use preach " .. npc if message and message ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. message end send(cmd)

Alias.name: Pinpoint Teleport
Alias.script: if matches[2] and matches[2] ~= "" then Tem.wiz_cast_raw("pinpointteleport " .. matches[2]) else Tem.wiz_cast_no_target("pinpointteleport") end

Alias.name: Vacuous Delirium
Alias.script: if matches[2] and matches[2] ~= "" then Tem.wiz_cast_raw("vacuousdelirium " .. matches[2]) else Tem.wiz_cast_no_target("vacuousdelirium") end

Alias.name: Wizard's Lab Generic
Alias.script: local action = matches[2] local arg = matches[3] if (action == "view" or action == "craft") and (not arg or arg == "") then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Usage: wlab " .. action .. " <slot>.\n") return end local cmd = "wizardslab " .. action if arg and arg ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. arg end Tem.wiz_use_raw(cmd)

Alias.name: Bind Wounds
Alias.script: local tgt = matches[2] if not tgt or tgt == "" then tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return end end send("use bindwounds " .. tgt)

Alias.name: Lunar ranged reminder
Alias.script: cecho("<cyan>[Lunar Sage] Use fire aliases from Tempest Combat: frap/fdeft/fprec/fauto and mv/mvt for movement.\n")

Alias.name: Twin Rend
Alias.script: local tgt = matches[2] if not tgt or tgt == "" then tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return end end send("use twinrend " .. tgt)

Script.name: target helper
Script.script:
Tem = Tem or {}
Tem.tgt = Tem.tgt or "" Tem.risk = Tem.risk or "good" -- Preference when the wielded weapon supports multiple melee lines (slash/blunt/thrust). Tem.wln = Tem.wln or "blunt" -- wslash / wblunt / wthrust: nil until weapon-probe triggers fire, or you wreset. Tem.charname = Tem.charname or "" -- From "You can move Nft(Uunits)!"; optional cap for Tem.mv (e.g. 1 when server allows one unit per command). Tem.mvft = Tem.mvft or nil Tem.mvunits = Tem.mvunits or nil Tem.mvcap = Tem.mvcap or nil
function Tem.trim(value) return tostring(value or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
function Tem.setname(name) Tem.charname = Tem.trim(name) if Tem.charname ~= "" then cecho("<cyan>[Tempest] Character name set for self-checks: <white>" .. Tem.charname .. "\n") end end
function Tem.selfname() local n = Tem.charname or "" if n ~= "" then return n end if type(gmcp) == "table" and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name then return tostring(gmcp.Char.Name) end return "" end
local function norm_lower(s) return Tem.trim(s):lower() end
local function is_target_self(name) local self_name = Tem.selfname() if self_name == "" or name == "" then return false end return norm_lower(name) == norm_lower(self_name) end
function Tem.setwln(line) local key = norm_lower(line) if key ~= "sharp" and key ~= "blunt" and key ~= "thrust" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] weapon_line must be sharp, blunt, or thrust.\n") return false end Tem.wln = key return true end
function Tem.resetw() Tem.wslash = nil Tem.wblunt = nil Tem.wthrust = nil Tem.lcranged = false Tem.lunar_core_weapon = false end
function Tem.noteslash(line) Tem.wslash = true -- Lunar cores still print slashing/blunt probe lines; do not drop ranged auto. if not Tem.lunar_core_weapon then Tem.lcranged = false end end
function Tem.noteblunt(line) Tem.wblunt = true if not Tem.lunar_core_weapon then Tem.lcranged = false end end
function Tem.notethrust(line) Tem.wthrust = true if not Tem.lunar_core_weapon then Tem.lcranged = false end end
--- Effective line for verb choice: single-style from probes, or weapon_line when dual/triple. function Tem.effwln() local s = Tem.wslash local b = Tem.wblunt local th = Tem.wthrust local w = Tem.wln or "blunt"
if s == true and b ~= true and th ~= true then return "sharp" end if b == true and s ~= true and th ~= true then return "blunt" end if th == true and s ~= true and b ~= true then return "thrust" end
if s == true and b == true and th ~= true then return w == "sharp" and "sharp" or "blunt" end if s == true and th == true and b ~= true then return w == "thrust" and "thrust" or "sharp" end if b == true and th == true and s ~= true then return w == "thrust" and "thrust" or "blunt" end if s == true and b == true and th == true then if w == "sharp" or w == "blunt" or w == "thrust" then return w end return "sharp" end
return w end
function Tem.mverb(tier) local t = tostring(tier or ""):lower() local wl = Tem.effwln() if wl == "sharp" then if t == "safe" then return "slash" end if t == "mid" then return "slice" end if t == "heavy" then return "cleave" end elseif wl == "thrust" then if t == "safe" then return "jab" end if t == "mid" then return "stab" end if t == "heavy" then return "thrust" end else if t == "safe" then return "pound" end if t == "mid" then return "crush" end if t == "heavy" then return "smash" end end return nil end
--- Ranged attack style for fire: safe -> rapid, mid -> deftly, heavy -> precisely (see attackinfo / help fire). function Tem.rverb(tier) local t = tostring(tier or ""):lower() if t == "safe" then return "rapid" end if t == "mid" then return "deftly" end if t == "heavy" then return "precisely" end return nil end
function Tem.settgt(name) name = tostring(name or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
if name == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] No target supplied.\n") return false end
Tem.tgt = name
cecho("<cyan>[Tempest] Target set: <white>" .. name .. "\n") return true end
function Tem.gettgt() if Tem.tgt and Tem.tgt ~= "" then return Tem.tgt end
return nil end
function Tem.reqtgt() local tgt = Tem.gettgt()
if not tgt or tgt == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] No target set. Use: tt <name>\n") return nil end
if is_target_self(tgt) then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Target is your character name; clear or change target with tt.\n") return nil end
return tgt end
function Tem.normfav(value, silent) local text = tostring(value or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$"):lower() if text == "" then return nil end
if text == "min" or text == "max" or text:match("^%d+$") then return text end
if not silent then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Invalid favors value. Use: min, max, or a number.\n") end return nil end
function Tem.pray(gift, target_name, favors) local cmd = "pray " .. gift local target_text = tostring(target_name or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if target_text ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. target_text end
local favors_text = Tem.normfav(favors) if favors_text then cmd = cmd .. " " .. favors_text end
send(cmd) end
--- Buff-style alias: target is tt (or self if unset). If the first optional word is a --- favors token (min/max/digits), it applies to that target. Otherwise the first word is --- a manual denizen name for this cast only (tt unchanged). Optional second word = favors. --- Not used for celestial grasp (self-only). function Tem.praybuff(gift, opt_first, opt_second) local target_name local favors
local first = tostring(opt_first or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if first == "" then local gt = Tem.gettgt() target_name = (gt and gt ~= "") and gt or "self" favors = nil else local maybe_favors = Tem.normfav(first, true) if maybe_favors then local gt = Tem.gettgt() target_name = (gt and gt ~= "") and gt or "self" favors = maybe_favors else target_name = first favors = opt_second end end
Tem.pray(gift, target_name, favors) end
--- Offense / require-target prayers: use Tem.reqtgt() when no manual name. --- If the first optional word is a favors token, target comes from Tem.reqtgt(). --- Otherwise the first word is a manual denizen name (tt unchanged); optional second = favors. function Tem.prayoff(gift, opt_first, opt_second) local target_name local favors
local first = tostring(opt_first or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
if first == "" then target_name = Tem.reqtgt() if not target_name then return end favors = nil else local maybe_favors = Tem.normfav(first, true) if maybe_favors then target_name = Tem.reqtgt() if not target_name then return end favors = maybe_favors else target_name = first favors = opt_second end end
Tem.pray(gift, target_name, favors) end
local function resolve_attack_target(explicit_target) local text = tostring(explicit_target or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if text ~= "" then return text end return Tem.gettgt() end
function Tem.atk(attack, explicit_target) local target_name = resolve_attack_target(explicit_target) if target_name and target_name ~= "" then if is_target_self(target_name) then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Refusing to attack yourself; fix target (tt) or character name (Tem.setname).\n") return false end send(attack .. " " .. target_name) else send(attack) end if Tem.notecombatactivity then Tem.notecombatactivity("attack") end return true end
--- Syntax: fire <rapid|deftly|precisely> <target> (game allows abbreviations; we send full words). function Tem.fire(verb, explicit_target) local v = tostring(verb or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if v == "" then return false end local target_name = resolve_attack_target(explicit_target) if not target_name or target_name == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Ranged fire needs a target (tt or second argument).\n") return false end if is_target_self(target_name) then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Refusing to fire on yourself; fix target (tt) or character name (Tem.setname).\n") return false end send("fire " .. v .. " " .. target_name) if Tem.notecombatactivity then Tem.notecombatactivity("attack") end return true end
function Tem.setrisk(value) local band = tostring(value or ""):lower():match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") local valid = { good = true, neutral = true, bad = true, critical = true, }
if not valid[band] then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Invalid risk band. Use: good, neutral, bad, critical.\n") return false end
Tem.risk = band cecho("<cyan>[Tempest] Risk band set: <white>" .. band .. "\n") return true end
local function _risk_tier_from_band() local rb = tostring(Tem.risk or "neutral"):lower() if rb == "good" then return "heavy" end if rb == "bad" or rb == "critical" then return "safe" end return "mid" end
function Tem.melee(kind, explicit_target) local key = tostring(kind or ""):lower() local tier = nil
if key == "safe" then tier = "safe" elseif key == "mid" then tier = "mid" elseif key == "heavy" then tier = "heavy" elseif key == "auto" then tier = _risk_tier_from_band() else cecho("<red>[Tempest] Unknown melee mode. Use: safe, mid, heavy, auto.\n") return false end
local attack = Tem.mverb(tier) if not attack then return false end
Tem.atk(attack, explicit_target) return true end
--- Same modes as send_melee: safe/mid/heavy/auto from Risk (parallel to melee tier mapping). function Tem.ranged(kind, explicit_target) local key = tostring(kind or ""):lower() local tier = nil
if key == "safe" then tier = "safe" elseif key == "mid" then tier = "mid" elseif key == "heavy" then tier = "heavy" elseif key == "auto" then tier = _risk_tier_from_band() else cecho("<red>[Tempest] Unknown ranged mode. Use: safe, mid, heavy, auto.\n") return false end
local verb = Tem.rverb(tier) if not verb then return false end
return Tem.fire(verb, explicit_target) end
--- Room positioning: move +/-<units> (1 unit = 5ft per help move). Honors Tem.mvcap when set. function Tem.mv(delta) local n = tonumber(delta) if not n or n == 0 then cecho("<red>[Tempest] mv needs a non-zero number (e.g. +1 or -2).\n") return false end local cap = tonumber(Tem.mvcap) if cap and cap > 0 and math.abs(n) > cap then n = n > 0 and cap or -cap end if n > 0 then send("move +" .. tostring(n)) else send("move " .. tostring(n)) end return true end
--- move <target> — advance toward a denizen or player name. function Tem.mvt(name) name = tostring(name or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") or "" if name == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] move_towards needs a target name.\n") return false end send("move " .. name) return true end
--- Trigger helper: game line "You can move 5ft(1units)!". Pass feet and units from capture groups, or one full line string. function Tem.notemv(a, b) local feet, units = a, b if b == nil and type(a) == "string" then feet, units = tostring(a):match("You can move (%d+)ft%((%d+)units%)") end feet = tonumber(feet) units = tonumber(units) if feet then Tem.mvft = feet end if units then Tem.mvunits = units end end

Script.name: combat automation
Script.script:
-- Shared Tempest combat automation (all classes). Depends on the target helpers above. Tem.autoon = Tem.autoon or false Tem.posture = Tem.posture or "mid" Tem.aadelay = Tem.aadelay or 2.1 Tem._aatimer = Tem._aatimer or nil Tem._postswitchtimer = Tem._postswitchtimer or nil -- True while server reports Knocked Down (posture line or knockdown message). Tem.kd = Tem.kd or false -- Set true when Posture trigger has fired at least once (see update_posture_from_line). Tem._postseen = Tem._postseen or false -- After queue clear + stand, cleared when posture line shows upright (no Knocked Down). Tem._kdrec = Tem._kdrec or false Tem.autoposture = Tem.autoposture ~= false Tem.posture_level_gate = Tem.posture_level_gate or false Tem.mindStateName = Tem.mindStateName or nil Tem.myPostureName = Tem.myPostureName or nil Tem.postureActive = Tem.postureActive or false Tem.postureCooldowns = Tem.postureCooldowns or {} Tem._pendingPosture = Tem._pendingPosture or nil Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt = Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt or 0 Tem._lastPostureSwitchAt = Tem._lastPostureSwitchAt or 0 Tem.moraleState = Tem.moraleState or "none" Tem.moralePct = Tem.moralePct or 0 Tem.moraleProtected = Tem.moraleProtected or false Tem.lastCombatActionAt = Tem.lastCombatActionAt or 0 Tem.lastMoraleTickAt = Tem.lastMoraleTickAt or 0 Tem.moraleDecaySeconds = tonumber(Tem.moraleDecaySeconds) or 60 Tem.npcPostureDB = Tem.npcPostureDB or {} Tem.postureDbMaxEntries = tonumber(Tem.postureDbMaxEntries) or 150 Tem.combatRestrictedUntil = tonumber(Tem.combatRestrictedUntil) or 0
-- #region agent log local function _agent_log(hypothesisId, location, message, data) return end
function Tem.dbg_enemy_posture_trigger(matches) return end
-- #endregion agent log
local function combat_cecho(msg) cecho("\n" .. tostring(msg or "")) end
local _POSTURES = {"dominance", "form", "mind", "movement"}
local function _now_s() if os and os.time then return tonumber(os.time()) or 0 end return 0 end
local function _trim(s) if type(Tem.trim) == "function" then return Tem.trim(s) end return tostring(s or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
local function _enforce_posture_db_cap() local max_entries = tonumber(Tem.postureDbMaxEntries) or 150 if max_entries < 1 then return end
local rows = {} for key, info in pairs(Tem.npcPostureDB or {}) do rows[#rows + 1] = { key = key, seenAt = tonumber(info and info.seenAt or 0) or 0, } end
if #rows <= max_entries then return end
table.sort( rows, function(a, b) if a.seenAt == b.seenAt then return tostring(a.key) < tostring(b.key) end return a.seenAt < b.seenAt end )
for i = 1, (#rows - max_entries) do Tem.npcPostureDB[rows[i].key] = nil end end
local function _canon_posture(name) local x = _trim(name):lower() if x == "dominance" or x == "form" or x == "mind" or x == "movement" then return x end return nil end
local function _target_key(name) local x = _trim(name):lower() x = x:gsub("^(a|an|the)%s+", "") x = x:gsub("[^%w%s%-_']", "") x = x:gsub("%s+", " ") return _trim(x) end
local function _is_helpfile_or_skill_line(line) local l = _trim(tostring(line or "")):lower() if l == "" then return false end if l:find("^see%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^starting at level%s+%d+") then return true end if l:find("^the postures are%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^keywords%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^syntax%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^training%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^range%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^toggle%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^type%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^skill%s*$") then return true end if l:find("^maximum training level%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^character level required%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^training key%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^additional info%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^%-%s*type%s*:") then return true end if l:find("^morale buffs") then return true end if l:find("^weakness debuffs") then return true end if l:find("help%s+posture:%s*") then return true end if l:find("for example,%s*if%s+") and l:find("posture:%s*") then return true end local raw = _trim(tostring(line or "")) if raw:find("^POSTURE%s*:") then return true end return false end
local function _morale_rank(state) local s = tostring(state or "none"):lower() if s == "eager" then return 1 end if s == "steady" then return 2 end if s == "determined" then return 3 end return 0 end
local function _known_target_posture() if not Tem.gettgt then return nil end local target = _target_key(Tem.gettgt() or "") if target == "" then return nil end local row = Tem.npcPostureDB[target] if not row then return nil end return _canon_posture(row.posture), target end
local function _sync_idle_morale_decay() if Tem.moraleProtected then return end if _morale_rank(Tem.moraleState) <= 0 then return end local now = _now_s() local last = tonumber(Tem.lastCombatActionAt) or 0 if last <= 0 then return end local due = tonumber(Tem.lastMoraleTickAt) or last local step = tonumber(Tem.moraleDecaySeconds) or 60 if step < 10 then step = 60 end if now - due < step then return end local rank = _morale_rank(Tem.moraleState) rank = rank - 1 if rank <= 0 then Tem.moraleState = "none" elseif rank == 1 then Tem.moraleState = "eager" else Tem.moraleState = "steady" end Tem.lastMoraleTickAt = now end
local function _request_posture(posture_name, why) local posture = _canon_posture(posture_name) if not posture then return false end local now = _now_s() if now < tonumber(Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt or 0) then return false end local cd = tonumber(Tem.postureCooldowns[posture] or 0) if now < cd then return false end
if Tem.postureActive and Tem.myPostureName and Tem.myPostureName ~= posture then Tem._pendingPosture = posture Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt = now + 2 send("use posture:" .. Tem.myPostureName) combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Auto posture: toggling off " .. Tem.myPostureName .. " (" .. tostring(why or "switch") .. ").\n") return true end
Tem._pendingPosture = nil Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt = now + 2 Tem._lastPostureSwitchAt = now send("use posture:" .. posture) combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Auto posture: use posture:" .. posture .. " (" .. tostring(why or "switch") .. ").\n") return true end
function Tem.notecombatactivity(_src) local now = _now_s() Tem.lastCombatActionAt = now Tem.lastMoraleTickAt = now end
function Tem.notecombatrestriction(line) local lower = tostring(line or ""):lower() local secs = lower:match( "you are in combat and cannot do this action%. you may do so in (%d+) seconds" ) if not secs then return end local n = tonumber(secs) or 0 local now = _now_s() Tem.combatRestrictedUntil = math.max(tonumber(Tem.combatRestrictedUntil or 0), now + n) Tem.notecombatactivity("combat_restrict") end
function Tem.noteenemyposture(full_line, target_name, posture_name) if posture_name == nil then posture_name = target_name target_name = full_line full_line = nil end local raw_line = tostring(full_line or "") if raw_line ~= "" then local parsed_target = raw_line:match("^%s*(.-)%s*'s%s+[Pp]osture%s*:") or raw_line:match("^%s*(.-)%s+[Pp]osture%s+is%s+") if parsed_target and _trim(parsed_target) ~= "" then target_name = parsed_target end end if full_line and _is_helpfile_or_skill_line(full_line) then return end local raw = _trim(target_name):lower() if raw == "you" or raw:find("^you%s", 1) or raw:find("^you'", 1) then return end local target = _target_key(target_name) local posture = _canon_posture(posture_name) if target == "" or not posture then return end local bad_keys = { you = true, stop = true, using = true, enter = true, lose = true, the = true, your = true, keywords = true, syntax = true, training = true, range = true, toggle = true, type = true, skill = true, reuse = true, maximum = true, additional = true, character = true, posture = true, morale = true, weakness = true, must = true, see = true, help = true, example = true, } if bad_keys[target] or #target < 3 then return end if target == "you" or target:find("you stop using posture", 1, true) or target:find("you enter the", 1, true) or target:find("posture", 1, true) then return end local prev = Tem.npcPostureDB[target] or {} local hits = tonumber(prev.hits or 0) + 1 Tem.npcPostureDB[target] = { posture = posture, source = "line", hits = hits, seenAt = _now_s(), } _enforce_posture_db_cap() combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Learned posture: " .. target .. " => " .. posture .. ".\n") end
function Tem.notemindstate(capture) local name = _trim(capture or "") name = name:gsub("%s*!$", "") if name == "" then return end Tem.mindStateName = name Tem.notecombatactivity("mind") end
function Tem.noteweakness(line) local t = tostring(line or "") if _is_helpfile_or_skill_line(t) then return end local lower = t:lower() if not lower:find("weakness", 1, true) then return end
local applied = lower:match("you apply the weakness%s+([a-z]+)%s+weakness:") if applied then local mob_posture = _canon_posture(applied) if mob_posture and Tem.gettgt then local target = _target_key(Tem.gettgt() or "") if target ~= "" then local prev = Tem.npcPostureDB[target] or {} local hits = tonumber(prev.hits or 0) + 1 Tem.npcPostureDB[target] = { posture = mob_posture, source = "weakness_apply", hits = hits, seenAt = _now_s(), } _enforce_posture_db_cap() combat_cecho( "<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Learned posture (weakness apply): " .. target .. " => " .. mob_posture .. ".\n" ) end end return end
if not (lower:find("exploit", 1, true) or lower:find("afflict", 1, true)) then return end if not Tem.gettgt then return end local target = _target_key(Tem.gettgt() or "") local posture = _canon_posture(Tem.myPostureName) if target == "" or not posture then return end local prev = Tem.npcPostureDB[target] or {} local hits = tonumber(prev.hits or 0) + 1 Tem.npcPostureDB[target] = { posture = posture, source = "weakness", hits = hits, seenAt = _now_s(), } _enforce_posture_db_cap() combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Weakness inference: " .. target .. " likely " .. posture .. ".\n") end
function Tem.notepostureevent(line) local text = tostring(line or "") local lower = text:lower()
local entered = lower:match("you enter the%s+([a-z]+)%s+posture!") if not entered then entered = lower:match("you enter posture:%s*([a-z]+)!?") end if entered then local posture = _canon_posture(entered) or _trim(entered):lower() Tem.postureActive = true Tem.myPostureName = posture Tem._pendingPosture = nil Tem._lastPostureSwitchAt = _now_s() return end
local stopped = lower:match("you stop using posture:%s*([a-z]+)%s*!?$") if stopped then local just_stopped = _canon_posture(stopped) or _trim(stopped):lower() if Tem.myPostureName == just_stopped then Tem.myPostureName = nil end Tem.postureActive = false if Tem._pendingPosture then local want = Tem._pendingPosture Tem._pendingPosture = nil if tempTimer then if Tem._postswitchtimer and killTimer then killTimer(Tem._postswitchtimer) Tem._postswitchtimer = nil end Tem._postswitchtimer = tempTimer( 0.2, function() Tem._postswitchtimer = nil _request_posture(want, "continue switch") end ) end end return end
local lock_name, lock_secs = lower:match("posture:%s*([a-z]+)%s+cannot be used for another%s+(%d+)s") if lock_name and lock_secs then local posture = _canon_posture(lock_name) if posture then local now = _now_s() local cd_until = now + tonumber(lock_secs) Tem.postureCooldowns[posture] = cd_until if Tem.myPostureName == posture then -- If this line fires while we expected a toggle, treat posture as currently inactive. Tem.postureActive = false end Tem._pendingPosture = nil Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt = math.max(tonumber(Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt or 0), cd_until) end return end
local ready_name = lower:match("posture:%s*([a-z]+)%s+is now ready to be used") if ready_name then local posture = _canon_posture(ready_name) if posture then Tem.postureCooldowns[posture] = 0 end return end
if lower:find("you do not have a posture set", 1, true) then Tem.postureActive = false Tem.myPostureName = nil return end
if lower:find("you cannot use this ability because you have another risk posture active", 1, true) then if Tem.myPostureName then send("use posture:" .. Tem.myPostureName) else Tem.postureActive = true combat_cecho( "<yellow>[Tempest Combat] Risk posture conflict but no tracked posture; toggle your active posture manually or check triggers.\n" ) end return end end
function Tem.notemorale(line) local text = tostring(line or "") local lower = text:lower()
if lower:find("raising your morale", 1, true) then Tem.notecombatactivity("morale") end
local state = lower:match("your morale has grown!%s*you are now%s+([a-z]+)") if state then state = tostring(state):lower() if state == "eager" or state == "steady" or state == "determined" then Tem.moraleState = state Tem.notecombatactivity("morale") end return end
local gained = lower:match("your morale grew by%s+([%d%.]+)") if gained then gained = tostring(gained):gsub("%.$", "") Tem.moralePct = tonumber(gained) or Tem.moralePct or 0 Tem.notecombatactivity("morale") return end
if lower:find("you lose all of your morale buffs", 1, true) or lower:find("you have no morale active", 1, true) or lower:find("your morale state has decayed to none", 1, true) then Tem.moraleState = "none" Tem.moralePct = 0 return end
if lower:find("your morale state has decayed to", 1, true) then local d = lower:match("your morale state has decayed to%s+([a-z]+)") d = tostring(d or ""):gsub("[^a-z]", "") if d == "eager" or d == "steady" or d == "determined" then Tem.moraleState = d elseif d == "none" then Tem.moraleState = "none" end return end
if lower:find("the iron-will ends and your morale can now be lost", 1, true) then Tem.moraleProtected = false return end
if lower:find("your morale can no longer be lost", 1, true) or lower:find("morale cannot be lost", 1, true) then Tem.moraleProtected = true return end end
function Tem.setautoposture(on) Tem.autoposture = on and true or false combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Auto posture " .. (Tem.autoposture and "on" or "off") .. ".\n") return true end
function Tem.onposturelevelgate(_line) Tem.posture_level_gate = true Tem.autoposture = false combat_cecho( "<yellow>[Tempest Combat] Auto posture off: Postures are not available at your level yet. After unlocking Postures, run `apunlock` then `apon`.\n" ) return true end
function Tem.clearposturelevelgate() Tem.posture_level_gate = false combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Posture level gate cleared; use `apon` if your character can use Postures.\n") return true end
function Tem.clearposturedb() Tem.npcPostureDB = {} combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Cleared learned NPC posture data.\n") return true end
function Tem.pruneposturedb() local bad_keys = { you = true, stop = true, using = true, enter = true, lose = true, the = true, your = true, keywords = true, syntax = true, training = true, range = true, toggle = true, type = true, skill = true, reuse = true, maximum = true, additional = true, character = true, posture = true, morale = true, weakness = true, must = true, see = true, help = true, example = true, } local removed = 0 for k in pairs(Tem.npcPostureDB or {}) do local key = tostring(k):lower() if bad_keys[key] or #key < 3 then Tem.npcPostureDB[k] = nil removed = removed + 1 end end combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Pruned " .. tostring(removed) .. " bogus posture DB key(s).\n") return true end
function Tem.autoposturestatus() local known = 0 for _ in pairs(Tem.npcPostureDB or {}) do known = known + 1 end combat_cecho( "<cyan>[Tempest Combat] autoPosture=" .. tostring(Tem.autoposture) .. " postureLevelGate=" .. tostring(Tem.posture_level_gate) .. " myPosture=" .. tostring(Tem.myPostureName or "none") .. " postureActive=" .. tostring(Tem.postureActive) .. " morale=" .. tostring(Tem.moraleState or "none") .. " mindState=" .. tostring(Tem.mindStateName or "none") .. " knownTargets=" .. tostring(known) .. " combatRestrictedUntil=" .. tostring(Tem.combatRestrictedUntil or 0) .. "\n" ) return true end
function Tem.dumposturedb() local rows = {} local now = _now_s() for target, info in pairs(Tem.npcPostureDB or {}) do rows[#rows + 1] = { target = tostring(target), posture = tostring(info.posture or "unknown"), source = tostring(info.source or "unknown"), hits = tonumber(info.hits or 0), age = math.max(0, now - tonumber(info.seenAt or now)), } end
table.sort( rows, function(a, b) if a.hits ~= b.hits then return a.hits > b.hits end return a.target < b.target end )
if #rows == 0 then combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] No learned NPC posture entries.\n") return true end
combat_cecho("<cyan>[Tempest Combat] Learned NPC postures (" .. tostring(#rows) .. "):\n") for i = 1, #rows do local r = rows[i] cecho( "<cyan> " .. r.target .. " => <white>" .. r.posture .. "<cyan> src=<white>" .. r.source .. "<cyan> hits=<white>" .. tostring(r.hits) .. "<cyan> age=<white>" .. tostring(r.age) .. "s\n" ) if i >= 20 then cecho("<cyan> ... truncated to top 20 entries.\n") break end end return true end
local function maybe_adjust_posture() if not Tem.autoposture then return false end if Tem.posture_level_gate then return false end if Tem.kd then return false end
_sync_idle_morale_decay()
local now = _now_s() if now < tonumber(Tem._nextPostureSwitchAt or 0) then return false end
local known, key = _known_target_posture() local morale_rank = _morale_rank(Tem.moraleState) local desired = nil local reason = "hold"
if known then desired = known reason = "known target " .. tostring(key or "") elseif not Tem.postureActive then desired = "form" reason = "ensure active posture" end
if not desired then return false end
if morale_rank > 0 and not known then return false end
if Tem.postureActive and Tem.myPostureName == desired then return false end
if now - tonumber(Tem._lastPostureSwitchAt or 0) < 8 then return false end
return _request_posture(desired, reason) end
local function cancel_attack_timer() if Tem._aatimer and killTimer then killTimer(Tem._aatimer) Tem._aatimer = nil end end
--- Dragon race: set from `score` line ("You go by the name of …"). nil = unknown until score. Tem.is_dragon = Tem.is_dragon or nil --- Dragon Claw skill reuse ready (combat lines); default true until a CD line is seen. if Tem._dclaw_ready == nil then Tem._dclaw_ready = true end
function Tem.note_score_dragon_line() local l = getCurrentLine() or "" local lower = l:lower() local stages = { "dragon whelp", "young dragon", "adolescent dragon", "adult dragon", "elder dragon", } for _, s in ipairs(stages) do if lower:find(s, 1, true) then Tem.is_dragon = true return end end if lower:find("you go by the name of", 1, true) then Tem.is_dragon = false end end
function Tem.dragon_use_target(skill, explicit) skill = Tem.trim(tostring(skill or "")):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if skill == "" then return false end local tgt = Tem.trim(tostring(explicit or "")) if tgt == "" then tgt = Tem.reqtgt() if not tgt then return false end end send("use " .. skill .. " " .. tgt) return true end
function Tem.dragon_use_self(skill) skill = Tem.trim(tostring(skill or "")):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if skill == "" then return false end send("use " .. skill) return true end
function Tem.dragon_passive(helpkey) helpkey = Tem.trim(tostring(helpkey or "")):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if helpkey == "" then return false end cecho("<yellow>[Tempest] Passive or automatic — see help " .. helpkey .. ".\n") send("help " .. helpkey) return true end
--- Dragon racial skills with syntax "automatic" in help (no manual `use` line). function Tem.dragon_auto(helpkey, label) helpkey = Tem.trim(tostring(helpkey or "")):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if helpkey == "" then return false end local disp = Tem.trim(tostring(label or "")) if disp == "" then disp = helpkey end cecho("<yellow>[Tempest] " .. disp .. " is automatic; no manual use cast.\n") send("help " .. helpkey) return true end
function Tem.dragon_tear_target() local tgt = Tem.gettgt() if not tgt or tgt == "" then return false end local selfn = Tem.selfname() if selfn ~= "" and Tem.trim(tgt):lower() == selfn:lower() then return false end send("use tear " .. tgt) return true end
function Tem.dragonclaw_ready() return Tem._dclaw_ready ~= false end
function Tem.note_dragonclaw_cooldown() Tem._dclaw_ready = false end
function Tem.note_dragonclaw_ready_line() Tem._dclaw_ready = true end
--- Rank for merging: lower = safer (pound/slash/jab), higher = heavier (smash/cleave/thrust).
local function _tier_to_rank(t) local x = tostring(t or ""):lower() if x == "safe" then return 1 end if x == "mid" then return 2 end if x == "heavy" then return 3 end return 2 end
local function _rank_to_tier(r) if r <= 1 then return "safe" end if r <= 2 then return "mid" end return "heavy" end
--- Merge posture tier with Risk band: use the safer (lower rank) of the two. --- Until any posture line is seen, Risk alone drives tier (default posture is not real data).
local function _risk_tier_from_band_local() local rb = tostring(Tem.risk or "neutral"):lower() if rb == "good" then return "heavy" end if rb == "bad" or rb == "critical" then return "safe" end return "mid" end
function Tem.autotier() local posture = Tem.posture or "mid" local risk = _risk_tier_from_band_local() if not Tem._postseen then return risk, posture, risk end local m = math.min(_tier_to_rank(posture), _tier_to_rank(risk)) return _rank_to_tier(m), posture, risk end
--- Queue clear + stand once per knockdown; shared by message triggers and posture line.
local function knockdown_apply_recovery() Tem.kd = true Tem.posture = "safe" cancel_attack_timer() if not Tem._kdrec then Tem._kdrec = true send("queue clear") send("stand") end end
function Tem.acoff(message) Tem.autoon = false cancel_attack_timer() if message ~= false then combat_cecho("<yellow>[Tempest Combat] Auto combat off.\n") end end
function Tem.acon(message) Tem.autoon = true if message ~= false then if Tem.is_dragon == true then combat_cecho( "<green>[Tempest Combat] Auto combat on (dragon: use tear vs tt; run score if race unknown).\n" ) else combat_cecho("<green>[Tempest Combat] Auto combat on (melee or ranged per weapon).\n") end end Tem.aaonce() end
function Tem.aasched() cancel_attack_timer() if not Tem.autoon then return end local delay = tonumber(Tem.aadelay) or 2.1 if tempTimer then Tem._aatimer = tempTimer( delay, function() Tem.aaonce() end ) end end
function Tem.aaonce() if not Tem.autoon then return end -- Do not queue attacks from the client while prone; server queue + delays block stand. if Tem.kd then return end if maybe_adjust_posture() then Tem.aasched() return end if Tem.is_dragon == true then Tem.dragon_tear_target() Tem.aasched() return end local tier = select(1, Tem.autotier()) if Tem.lcranged then if not Tem.ranged(tier, nil) then Tem.aasched() return end Tem.aasched() return end local attack = Tem.mverb(tier) if not attack then Tem.aasched() return end Tem.atk(attack, nil) Tem.aasched() end
--- Map posture text from game output to melee tier: safe | mid | heavy
function Tem.updposture(line) line = tostring(line or "") Tem._postseen = true local lower = line:lower() local pos_morale = lower:match("position%s*,%s*(eager|steady|determined)%+") if pos_morale then Tem.moraleState = pos_morale end if lower:find("knocked down", 1, true) then knockdown_apply_recovery() return end Tem.kd = false Tem._kdrec = false if line:find("Feeble") or line:find("Very Weak") or line:find("Very Unsteady") then Tem.posture = "safe" if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end return end if line:find("Unsteady") then Tem.posture = "safe" if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end return end if line:find("Weak") and not line:find("Very Weak") then Tem.posture = "mid" if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end return end if line:find("Neutral") then Tem.posture = "mid" if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end return end if line:find("Good") or line:find("Strong") then Tem.posture = "heavy" if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end return end if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end end
function Tem.onkd() knockdown_apply_recovery() end
--- Stops auto melee when the game rejects melee for "no usable weapon" reasons. --- Lunar Sage owns the same line and converts to ranged-only; defer to it when set.
function Tem.onmunu(reason) if not Tem.autoon then return end if Tem.lcranged then return end send("queue clear") Tem.acoff(false) combat_cecho( "<yellow>[Tempest Combat] Auto combat off: melee rejected (" .. tostring(reason or "no weapon") .. "). Wield a weapon (or use ranged) and `acon` again.\n" ) end
--- Stops auto melee when the game says the current target is invalid (e.g. mob dead, wrong name).
function Tem.onbadtgt() if not Tem.autoon then return end send("queue clear") Tem.acoff(false) combat_cecho("<yellow>[Tempest Combat] Auto combat off: invalid target. Set target with tt.\n") end
--- Call from a trigger on your game's stand-success line if posture updates lag behind.
function Tem.noteup() Tem.kd = false Tem._kdrec = false if Tem.autoon then Tem.aasched() end end

Script.name: Functions
Script.script:
Tem = Tem or {}
--- Inspect/probe keyword -> damage style(s). String: single. Table: dual (Tem.effwln uses Tem.wln when multiple). Tem.weapon_types = { scythe = "slash", star = { "blunt", "slash" }, club = "blunt", dagger = { "slash", "thrust" }, }
function Tem.apply_weapon_keyword(keyword) local k = tostring(keyword or ""):lower():match("^%s*(%S+)") if not k then return end local t = Tem.weapon_types[k] if not t then return end if type(t) == "table" then for _, style in ipairs(t) do if style == "slash" then Tem.noteslash("") elseif style == "blunt" then Tem.noteblunt("") elseif style == "thrust" then Tem.notethrust("") end end elseif t == "slash" then Tem.noteslash("") elseif t == "blunt" then Tem.noteblunt("") elseif t == "thrust" then Tem.notethrust("") end end
--- e.g. inspect line "This is a scythe and does tier N Slash damage." (any tier N; trigger uses [0-9]+). function Tem.note_inspect_damage_line(line) line = tostring(line or "") local low = line:lower() if not low:find("this is a", 1, true) or not low:find("damage", 1, true) then return end local has_slash = low:find("slash", 1, true) local has_blunt = low:find("blunt", 1, true) or low:find("crush", 1, true) if has_slash then Tem.noteslash(line) end if has_blunt then Tem.noteblunt(line) end if not has_slash and not has_blunt then local phrase = low:match("this is a%s+(.-)%s+and does") if phrase then local kw = phrase:match("(%S+)$") if kw then Tem.apply_weapon_keyword(kw) end end end end
local function psi_trim(text) if type(Tem.trim) == "function" then return Tem.trim(text) end return tostring(text or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
--- Send manipulate ability [target]. If target is blank, fall back to tt; if tt is unset, send without target. function Tem.psi_cast(ability, explicitTarget) local spell = psi_trim(ability):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing psionic ability token.\n") return false end
local tgt = psi_trim(explicitTarget) if tgt == "" and type(Tem.gettgt) == "function" then tgt = psi_trim(Tem.gettgt()) end
local cmd = "manipulate " .. spell if tgt ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. tgt end send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.psi_cast_no_target(ability) local spell = psi_trim(ability):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing psionic ability token.\n") return false end send("manipulate " .. spell) return true end
--- Repulse subcommands (help order: throw, then push). function Tem.psi_repulse(mode, explicitTarget) local m = psi_trim(mode):lower() if m ~= "throw" and m ~= "push" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Repulse: repu throw <target> or repu push <target> (uses tt if target omitted).\n") return false end
local tgt = psi_trim(explicitTarget) if tgt == "" and type(Tem.gettgt) == "function" then tgt = psi_trim(Tem.gettgt()) end
local cmd = "manipulate repulse " .. m if tgt ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. tgt end send(cmd) return true end
--- Some psionics are passive/automatic and cannot be manually manipulated. function Tem.psi_auto(ability) local spell = psi_trim(ability):lower():gsub("%s+", "") if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing psionic ability token.\n") return false end cecho("<yellow>[Tempest] " .. spell .. " is automatic; no manual manipulate cast.\n") send("help " .. spell) return true end
local function wiz_token(text) return psi_trim(text):lower():gsub("%s+", "") end
function Tem.wiz_cast(ability, explicitTarget) local spell = wiz_token(ability) if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard spell token.\n") return false end
local tgt = psi_trim(explicitTarget) if tgt == "" and type(Tem.gettgt) == "function" then tgt = psi_trim(Tem.gettgt()) end
local cmd = "cast " .. spell if tgt ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. tgt end send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.wiz_cast_no_target(ability) local spell = wiz_token(ability) if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard spell token.\n") return false end send("cast " .. spell) return true end
function Tem.wiz_cast_raw(args) local suffix = psi_trim(args) if suffix == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard cast syntax.\n") return false end send("cast " .. suffix) return true end
function Tem.wiz_use(ability, explicitTarget) local skill = wiz_token(ability) if skill == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard skill token.\n") return false end
local tgt = psi_trim(explicitTarget) if tgt == "" and type(Tem.gettgt) == "function" then tgt = psi_trim(Tem.gettgt()) end
local cmd = "use " .. skill if tgt ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. tgt end send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.wiz_use_no_target(ability) local skill = wiz_token(ability) if skill == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard skill token.\n") return false end send("use " .. skill) return true end
function Tem.wiz_use_raw(args) local suffix = psi_trim(args) if suffix == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard use syntax.\n") return false end send("use " .. suffix) return true end
function Tem.wiz_decomp(item) local target = psi_trim(item) if target == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Decomposition: wdecomp <item name|slot>.\n") return false end send("cast decomposition " .. target) return true end
function Tem.wiz_auto(ability) local spell = wiz_token(ability) if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing wizard ability token.\n") return false end cecho("<yellow>[Tempest] " .. spell .. " is automatic or triggered; opening help.\n") send("help " .. spell) return true end

Script.name: Lunar helper functions
Script.script:
Tem = Tem or {}
Tem.lcranged = Tem.lcranged or false Tem.lunar_core_weapon = Tem.lunar_core_weapon or false
local function trim(text) if type(Tem.trim) == "function" then return Tem.trim(text) end return tostring(text or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
function Tem.cycle(token, extra) local spell = trim(token) if spell == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing cycle token.\n") return false end
local cmd = "cycle " .. spell local suffix = trim(extra) if suffix ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. suffix end
send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.syz(filter_text) local cmd = "syzygies" local filter = trim(filter_text) if filter ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. filter end
send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.incant(path, args) local incant = trim(path) if incant == "" then cecho("<red>[Tempest] Missing lunar incantation path.\n") return false end
local cmd = "use lunarincantations " .. incant local suffix = trim(args) if suffix ~= "" then cmd = cmd .. " " .. suffix end
send(cmd) return true end
function Tem.onlc() Tem.lunar_core_weapon = true Tem.lcranged = true if Tem.autoon and Tem.aasched then Tem.aasched() end end
function Tem.onlmunu() Tem.lunar_core_weapon = true Tem.lcranged = true if Tem.autoon and Tem.aasched then Tem.aasched() end end

Script.name: Moon UI helpers
